meta.title: Elephant Communication
meta.sourceDoc: 66. P3 - Elephant Communication 大象交流.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 28
答案：hammer / hammer bone
PDF 定位："The hammer bone in an elephant's inner ear is proportionallyhuge.."（第2段）
PDF 解析：图中箭头指向耳骨；需填"innerear的骨头"。

题目 29
答案：body
PDF 定位："Their massivebodies, which enable them to give out low- frequency sounds... serve as ideal frames for receiving groundvibrations"（第3段）
PDF 解析：箭头指向躯干，说明"extremelylarge"；原文直接用 "massive bodies"。

题目 30
答案：pad
PDF 定位："the elephant's toebones are set in a fattypad"（第3段）
PDF 解析：图注已有"toeandfatty"，仅补"pad"。

题目 31
答案：sinus cavities
PDF 定位：The front of the skull is riddled with sinus cavities, which might functionas resonating chambers..."（第3段）
PDF 解析：图注："big-sizedbrainskullwithmany"；填复数名词。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：trunks and feet
PDF 定位/解析："..pachyderms arelistening'with their trunks and feet instead of (or in addition to)their ears."（第4段)

题目 33
答案：infrasonic
PDF 定位/解析：*..one [nerve ending] detects infrasonic vibration and the other responds to vibrations of slightly higher frequencies."（第4段）

题目 34
答案：ecology
PDF 定位/解析："..at the interface of geophysics, neurophysiologyand ecology"(第4段)

题目 35
答案：seismic signals
PDF 定位/解析："o'Connell-Rodwellwas thefirst to argue that a giant land animal is also sending and receiving seismic signals."（第5段）

题目 36
答案：auditory communication
PDF 定位/解析：引述中提到：..perhapsauditorycommunicationisnottheonlythinggoingon."（第5段结尾处）

题目 37
答案：mate
PDF 定位/解析："It is already difficult for an elephant to find a mate in such a vast wilderness.." (第6段)

题目 38
答案：ground
PDF 定位/解析：*..elephants could indeed sense warning signals through the ground" (第7段)

questionSections.text:
题目 39
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：第6段："Breedingherdsalsoadoptlow-frequencysoundstowarnofpredators.."题干问"为生存而必须进行长距离沟通的情况"，警报 捕食者直接关乎个体生存。

题目 40
答案：A
PDF 定位/解析：第8段：..exactlyas/expected.However.../didn'texpecttheresultstobethatclear-cut。"表明结果在某些方面超出了原先预期，与选项 A（结果完全出乎原先预料）最吻合；其余选项与"数据清晰、结果明确"不符。
